28 #ifndef ROSCPP_FORWARDS_H
29 #define ROSCPP_FORWARDS_H

32 #include <vector>
33 #include <map>

37 #include <boost/shared_ptr.hpp>

40 #include <boost/function.hpp>

42 #include <ros/time.h>

47 namespace ros
48 {
49 
50 typedef boost::shared_ptr<void> VoidPtr;
51 typedef boost::weak_ptr<void> VoidWPtr;
52 typedef boost::shared_ptr<void const> VoidConstPtr;
53 typedef boost::weak_ptr<void const> VoidConstWPtr;
54 
55 class Header;
56 class Transport;
57 typedef boost::shared_ptr<Transport> TransportPtr;
58 class TransportTCP;
59 typedef boost::shared_ptr<TransportTCP> TransportTCPPtr;
60 class TransportUDP;
61 typedef boost::shared_ptr<TransportUDP> TransportUDPPtr;
62 class Connection;
63 typedef boost::shared_ptr<Connection> ConnectionPtr;
64 typedef std::set<ConnectionPtr> S_Connection;
65 typedef std::vector<ConnectionPtr> V_Connection;
66 class Publication;
67 typedef boost::shared_ptr<Publication> PublicationPtr;
68 typedef std::vector<PublicationPtr> V_Publication;
69 class SubscriberLink;
70 typedef boost::shared_ptr<SubscriberLink> SubscriberLinkPtr;
71 typedef std::vector<SubscriberLinkPtr> V_SubscriberLink;
72 class Subscription;
73 typedef boost::shared_ptr<Subscription> SubscriptionPtr;
74 typedef boost::weak_ptr<Subscription> SubscriptionWPtr;
75 typedef std::list<SubscriptionPtr> L_Subscription;
76 typedef std::vector<SubscriptionPtr> V_Subscription;
77 typedef std::set<SubscriptionPtr> S_Subscription;
78 class PublisherLink;
79 typedef boost::shared_ptr<PublisherLink> PublisherLinkPtr;
80 typedef std::vector<PublisherLinkPtr> V_PublisherLink;
81 class ServicePublication;
82 typedef boost::shared_ptr<ServicePublication> ServicePublicationPtr;
83 typedef std::list<ServicePublicationPtr> L_ServicePublication;
84 typedef std::vector<ServicePublicationPtr> V_ServicePublication;
85 class ServiceServerLink;
86 typedef boost::shared_ptr<ServiceServerLink> ServiceServerLinkPtr;
87 typedef std::list<ServiceServerLinkPtr> L_ServiceServerLink;
88 class Transport;
89 typedef boost::shared_ptr<Transport> TransportPtr;
90 class NodeHandle;
91 typedef boost::shared_ptr<NodeHandle> NodeHandlePtr;
92 
93 
94 class SingleSubscriberPublisher;
95 typedef boost::function<void(const SingleSubscriberPublisher&)> SubscriberStatusCallback;
96 
97 class CallbackQueue;
98 class CallbackQueueInterface;
99 class CallbackInterface;
100 typedef boost::shared_ptr<CallbackInterface> CallbackInterfacePtr;
101 
102 struct SubscriberCallbacks
103 {
104  SubscriberCallbacks(const SubscriberStatusCallback& connect = SubscriberStatusCallback(),
105  const SubscriberStatusCallback& disconnect = SubscriberStatusCallback(),
106  const VoidConstPtr& tracked_object = VoidConstPtr(),
107  CallbackQueueInterface* callback_queue = 0)
108  : connect_(connect)
109  , disconnect_(disconnect)
110  , callback_queue_(callback_queue)
111  {
112  has_tracked_object_ = false;
113  if (tracked_object)
114  {
115  has_tracked_object_ = true;
116  tracked_object_ = tracked_object;
117  }
118  }
119  SubscriberStatusCallback connect_;
120  SubscriberStatusCallback disconnect_;
121  boost::function<void(const SubscriberLinkPtr&)> push_latched_message_;
122 
123  bool has_tracked_object_;
124  VoidConstWPtr tracked_object_;
125  CallbackQueueInterface* callback_queue_;
126 };
127 typedef boost::shared_ptr<SubscriberCallbacks> SubscriberCallbacksPtr;
128 
132 struct TimerEvent
133 {
134  Time last_expected;
135  Time last_real;
136  Time last_expired;
137 
138  Time current_expected;
139  Time current_real;
140  Time current_expired;
141 
142  struct
143  {
144  WallDuration last_duration;
145  } profile;
146 };
147 typedef boost::function<void(const TimerEvent&)> TimerCallback;
148 
152 struct WallTimerEvent
153 {
154  WallTime last_expected;
155  WallTime last_real;
156  WallTime last_expired;
157 
158  WallTime current_expected;
159  WallTime current_real;
160  WallTime current_expired;
161 
162  struct
163  {
164  WallDuration last_duration;
165  } profile;
166 };
167 typedef boost::function<void(const WallTimerEvent&)> WallTimerCallback;
168 
172 struct SteadyTimerEvent
173 {
174  SteadyTime last_expected;
175  SteadyTime last_real;
176  SteadyTime last_expired;
177 
178  SteadyTime current_expected;
179  SteadyTime current_real;
180  SteadyTime current_expired;
181 
182  struct
183  {
184  WallDuration last_duration;
185  } profile;
186 };
187 typedef boost::function<void(const SteadyTimerEvent&)> SteadyTimerCallback;
188 
189 class ServiceManager;
190 typedef boost::shared_ptr<ServiceManager> ServiceManagerPtr;
191 class TopicManager;
192 typedef boost::shared_ptr<TopicManager> TopicManagerPtr;
193 class ConnectionManager;
194 typedef boost::shared_ptr<ConnectionManager> ConnectionManagerPtr;
195 class XMLRPCManager;
196 typedef boost::shared_ptr<XMLRPCManager> XMLRPCManagerPtr;
197 class PollManager;
198 typedef boost::shared_ptr<PollManager> PollManagerPtr;
199 
200 }
201 
202 #endif
ros::SteadyTimerEvent::current_expected
SteadyTime current_expected
In a perfect world, this is when the current callback should be happening.

SteadyTime last_expected
In a perfect world, this is when the last callback should have happened.
